title: SO Probe Snapshot
description: Records what a real SO runtime registered when the probe ran. Comparison anchor for manifest since_version fields; reference fixture for scenario authoring.

kit_application.description: Friendly name and version of the Kit app the probe ran in (e.g. 'USD Composer 110.1.0').

so_build_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC date the SO extension was built or released. Used as the comparison key when filtering ops by since_version. Filled in manually after capture because the extension does not expose buildTime.

operations_available.description: Operation keys the SO runtime registers, as returned by the selected operation registry probe. Sorted alphabetically.

probed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the probe ran. Reproducibility metadata.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about how the snapshot was captured.
